description:
👉 Welcome to the Ultimate Linux Masterclass in Tamil - 2025 Edition (4+ Hours Full Course) 💻
In this fully updated version, I have included all the most important Linux topics

✅ Topics Covered:

Basic Commands (ls, pwd, cd, mkdir, rm, touch)
Process Management (ps, top, kill, nohup)
Disk Usage (df, du)
File Handling (grep, find, awk, sort, wc, head, chmod, ln)
File Transfer & Server Access (ssh, scp, PuTTY, WinSCP)
Package Management (apt-get, wget)
Cron Jobs & Automation
Shell Scripting (Beginner to Advanced)
WSL Setup for Windows


 * [05:31] Open-Source Fundamentals
 * [09:29] What is Linux?
 * [14:05] Linux vs UNIX
 * [16:50] Why Linux?
 * [18:32] Linux vs Windows
 * [19:38] Does Linux Have Viruses?
 * [20:18] Is Linux Really an OS?
 * [21:40] What is a Kernel?
 * [25:54] Installing Ubuntu on Windows WSL
 * [28:16] Linux Terminal, Shell and Basic Commands
 * [35:23] Creating and Editing Files
 * [01:04:30] File System Navigation (LS and CD)
 * [01:24:01] Hard Links, Soft Links & Alias
 * [01:36:51] Background Jobs, nohup and Process Monitoring
 * [01:54:13] Disk Management, Zip/Unzip & Tar/Untar
 * [02:02:33] Word Count, Sort and Head
 * [02:07:15] Grep
 * [02:20:29] SSH and SCP
 * [02:39:49] Find
 * [02:44:20] AWK
 * [02:48:36] Change Mode
 * [02:58:15] Scheduling using Cron, Airflow, and Shell Script
 * [03:55:54] Shell Scripting
 * [04:09:42] Conclusion


👉 Perfect for:

Data Engineers
Data Analysts
Data Scientists
DevOps Engineers
Students preparing for Linux interviews
Anyone starting Linux from scratch

🎯 This is a complete practical guide for mastering Linux for data & software engineers.
🎯 Don't forget to subscribe and share with your friends preparing for Linux!

𝐁𝐮𝐲 𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐋𝐢𝐧𝐮𝐱 𝐌𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐂𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐬𝐞 - https://topmate.io/dataengineering/1678139
